prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (56mm inducer, 76mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe (engine code: PY-VPTS, 2.5L turbo Skyactiv-G) to support 350-400whp on E30-E50 ethanol blends with a Cobb Accessport v3 Stage 2+ tune and upgraded fuel system (Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator)

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension kit (part #OH-RT-4-0220) with 8-position adjustable damping, 20mm front/rear adjustable camber plates, and custom-valved monotube dampers for the CX-50's 107.5" wheelbase, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer 15mm wheel spacers (5x114.3 bolt pattern) to eliminate scrub radius

Differential reinforcement via Cusco 2-way LSD (1.5-way on power, 2-way on decel) with 45% preload (part #LSD202A) and upgraded rear subframe bushings (Energy Suspension polyurethane kit #4.5111G) to handle increased torque, combined with a PRL Motorsports short throw shifter (25% reduction) and Fidanza 8lb aluminum flywheel for the PY-VPTS engine
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (CX-50-specific, part #RB-CX50-V3) with carbon fiber fenders (2.5" flares), front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in Mazda Soul Red Crystal with custom matte black vinyl overlay on the hood and roof

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x9.5 +25 front / 20x10.5 +35 rear wheels (5x114.3, 73.1mm hub bore) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/20 front, 285/30/20 rear) with custom TPMS sensors (Voxx TPMS #TPMS-CX50)

Full custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro Sportster CS seats (CX-50-specific mounts, part #29100-CX50) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede) with NRG quick-release hub, and a full Alcantara headliner/door card rewrap by Katzkin (color-matched to Mazda's Parchment interior)
